creator: rootrider@shellfront.org
text: I've just compared the ansible 1.7.2 and ansible 1.8.2 port, and it appears that the 1.8.2 port does not include the /usr/local/share/ansible directory, which contains all of the included modules. I'm using poudriere to build my ports, so I'm only looking at the resulting packages right now. For what it's worth, I'm on 10.1-RELEASE-p1
